rules.inactive_rule: Local character images that are not on the live website roster are inactive and must not be generated.
rules.placeholder_rule: Active members using img/600.png are active placeholders. Do not generate unique avatars until identity details exist.
rules.avatar_text_rule: Avatar images must contain no readable text: no names, handles, roles, cap labels, clothing labels, signs, readable numbers, or written 600B marks.
rules.symbol_rule: Use wordless symbols instead: orange disks, abstract stacked glyphs, medallions, stones, orbs, costumes, silhouettes, objects, and posture.
rules.number_rule: The sacred number may appear in non-avatar scenes only, stacked as 600/000/000/000.
rules.style_rule: Avatar style target: cypherpunk, traditional/old-world craft, fantasy, cute manga/toon.
rules.full_body_rule: Generate adult full-body, head-to-toe, riggable humanoid characters unless explicitly making 2D mascot art.

active_members.name: dni
active_members.image_details: Dark hooded mystic/operator, glowing orange source disk behind head, raised hands, palm lights, chest light, warm ritual-tech atmosphere.
active_members.full_body_standard: Adult humanoid signal bearer in dark robe or long coat, centered and calm, hands open, small round stone or orb near chest or feet, wordless orange halo behind head, cypherpunk traditional fantasy cute manga/toon style.
